# Domain & Business Logic

## Content Hash Caching for Vault Rendering (kg_vault_hashes)

The kg_vault_hashes table stores SHA-256 content hashes for rendered knowledge vault files. Before re-rendering a knowledge entry to markdown, the system compares the new hash against the stored hash. If unchanged, the file is skipped. This optimization prevents redundant disk writes when knowledge content hasn't changed, reducing I/O during high-frequency extractions.

_Source: `src/op-knowledge.js`_

_Tags: `optimization`, `caching`, `hashing`, `vault`_

## Knowledge Extraction Token Budget Configuration

The config.json provides tuning parameters for knowledge extraction: knowledge_max_events_per_prompt (batch size, default 50) and knowledge_max_tokens (max Haiku output tokens, default 1000). These prevent overwhelming the LLM and control API costs. Cold-start scan adds knowledge_scan_files (default: README.md, package.json, CLAUDE.md) and knowledge_scan_patterns for extensibility.

_Source: `src/op-knowledge.js`_

_Tags: `configuration`, `knowledge`, `budget`, `tuning`_
